nasb.text: They carried the ark of God on a new cart from the house of Abinadab, and Uzza and Ahio drove the cart.

esv.text: And they carried the ark of God on a new cart, from the house of Abinadab, and Uzzah and Ahio were driving the cart.

cnv.text: 他們把　神的約櫃，從亞比拿達家裡抬出來，放在一輛新車上，烏撒和亞希約負責趕車。

ccb.text: 他们把上帝的约柜从亚比拿达家抬出来，放在一辆新车上，由乌撒和亚希约赶车。
